nasb.text: the commander ordered him to be brought into the barracks, stating that he should be examined by scourging so that he might find out the reason why they were shouting against him that way.

esv.text: the tribune ordered him to be brought into the barracks, saying that he should be examined by flogging, to find out why they were shouting against him like this.

cnv.text: 千夫長下令把保羅帶到營樓去，吩咐人用鞭子拷問他，要知道群眾為甚麼這樣向他喊叫。

ccb.text: 千夫长下令把保罗押回营房，预备鞭打拷问他，要查出众人向他咆哮的缘由。

csbs.text: 千夫长下令把保罗押进营楼，吩咐鞭打拷问他，要了解民众是因什么理由向他这样一直喊叫。
